  • Module

  • Help

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
GameController
Main controller for the Fast Typing game.
GameStage
Represents the main game window.
GameState
Represents the current state of a Fast Typing game session.
GameView
Defines the contract for updating the game's visual interface.
KeyboardAdapter
Adapter class that listens to keyboard events on the answer input field.
LevelProgressable
Defines a contract for objects that track and expose level progression state.
Main
Entry point for the Fast Typing (Escritura Rápida) application.
MouseHoverAdapter
Adapter class that adds hover (enter/exit) visual effects to JavaFX nodes.
Resettable
Defines a contract for objects that can be reset to their initial state.
TimerHandler
Manages the per-level countdown timer using a JavaFX Timeline.
Validatable
Defines a contract for objects that can validate a player's typed answer
WelcomeController
Controller for the welcome screen (Welcome-View.fxml).
WelcomeStage
Represents the welcome screen window of the Fast Typing game.
WelcomeView
Defines the contract for the welcome screen controller.
WordBank
Manages the word pool for the Fast Typing game, organized by difficulty tiers.
